AC-1.description: Route with rain in segments 2-4 (~2pm-4pm) shows 'Rain expected 2-4pm'
AC-1.evidence: Unit test 'should return range status for partial rain coverage' verifies timing calculation from 1pm departure with rain in legs 1-2 results in 2pm-2:30pm range

AC-2.description: No rain segments - Rain timing section not displayed
AC-2.evidence: Component returns null when displayText is null (no rain), story 'NoRain' demonstrates empty render

AC-3.description: Entire route has rain - Shows 'Rain throughout ride'
AC-3.evidence: Unit test 'should return throughout status when entire route has rain', formatRainTiming returns 'Rain throughout ride'

AC-4.description: Rain data unavailable - Shows 'Rain data unavailable' in muted style
AC-4.evidence: Component sets opacity to 0.6 for unavailable state, unit test verifies 'Rain data unavailable' output

validation_gates.icon_imports: PASS - Uses IconSymbol component (no direct @expo/vector-icons import)
validation_gates.state_handling: PASS - Handles no-rain, throughout, range, and unavailable states
validation_gates.accessibility: PASS - Uses semantic colors for muted state
validation_gates.typescript_strict: WARNING - Pre-existing TypeScript errors in codebase (not introduced by this PR)

improvements: TypeScript errors exist in codebase but are pre-existing (not introduced by US-008)
Consider adding explicit test for 12-hour formatting edge cases (already covered in unit tests)

tdd_evidence.red_phase: PASS - Tests written first, verify they fail without implementation
tdd_evidence.test_quality: PASS - Tests verify behavior not implementation, cover all AC scenarios
